name: Chimera CUSTOM XG
short_description: You are a genetically enhanced super soldier tasked with defending Earth from an onslaught of alien foes. Blast your way through endless hordes in a conspiracy riddled side scrolling bullet hell adventure and become more dangerous than the truth. Become the Chimera!
detailed_description:
WAKE UP. REALITY’S CRACKED.

Aliens have finally invaded, loud, mean, and not here for us. Earth has been scorched, defenses are obliterated, but the war isn’t over. What are the invaders after?

You are a C.U.S.T.O.M. soldier, engineered with the perfect balance of strength, aggression, and stupidity. Fuse with Animal Genetics, load up on high tech weaponry, and run throat first into danger.

Blast your way through sewer scum in New Los Angeles to the bloodied snows in Antarctica and more! Which timeline will bring forth the truth?

NO LIMITS ONLY XTREME GREATNESS. 

Clear waves, choose mutations, and morph your DNA to the extreme! Stack damage, hoard HP, size up your bullets, and more. Special gene augments crank your Animal Genetics to their evolutionary breaking point.

High-speed nuanced twin-stick action with melee, dodging, grenade cooking, animal DNA, and endless augment combos. Every button counts and every move has teeth.

Whatever keeps you alive is allowed, despite what Geneva says.

C.U.S.T.O.M.-IZE EVERYTHING. REGRET NOTHING.

Mod your weapons on the fly, pick the affix that fits your attitude, and become the problem. Master the Animal Power that accentuates your playstyle, because destruction should be custom-tailored.

On your missions through space and time, perfect your genetic signature until you’re a walking war crime.

SQUAD LOCKED. GUNS LOADED.

Squad up in 4-player co-op with your emotional support gremlins and jump right into the action. The game scales with your crew, so every run hits hard, stays fresh, and keeps you coming back for more.

Perfect for tryhards and button-mashers alike because death’s a lot less lonely with friends.

TEST IT. BREAK IT. SHAPE IT.

Your voice shapes the game. We listen, tweak fast, and update even faster.

Join early. Make it yours.

CRACK THE PLANET. PUNCH SOME ALIENS.

Dive into the lurch with ever changing paths of chaos, making every run unique. Pull the thread with help from unlikely allies. Will you merely scrape the surface, or delve deeper into the conspiracy? Every run brings you closer to the truth!
